description.value:
Frequency once per minute

You're an experienced warrior who can tap into your predatory instincts and completely focus on a single creature you can detect—to the exclusion of everything else. Those incapable of understanding these instincts might even believe you've lost your senses. The GM rolls a secret counteract check against any illusion, morph, or polymorph effect on a target, but only for the purposes of determining whether you see through it, with a counteract rank of 6 and a counteract modifier equal to your Perception modifier.

You get a +2 status bonus to Perception checks when you [[/act seek]] the chosen creature and to Survival checks to [[/act track]] the chosen creature, but all other creatures become @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Hidden] to you. This lasts 1 minute, until the target dies, or until you fall @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Unconscious], whichever comes first. If you take damage, you can voluntarily end your trance as a reaction, which has the concentrate trait.
